But rows 48-51 don't overlap with rows 52-59, so there shouldn't be a collision.

Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the initial state. After the game reset, the platform was at rows 16-19. But maybe the game didn't fully reset, and the platform was actually at a different position. Let me check the history.
Actually, I printed the current state before the 9 DOWN moves, and the platform was at rows 16-19. So the 9 DOWN moves should have moved it to rows 52-55. But it's at rows 44-47.
Hmm, maybe some of the DOWN moves were blocked. Let me check the timer. The timer went from 64 pixels to 45 pixels, which is a decrease of 19 pixels. If each action decreases the timer by about 2 pixels, then 9 actions would decrease it by 18 pixels. But it decreased by 19, which is close.
Wait, maybe the issue is that the platform is being blocked by the yellow platforms when trying to move down. The left yellow platform is at rows 52-59, cols 16-27. The blue platform is at cols 12-31. When the blue platform is at rows 48-51, cols 12-31, and I try to move it DOWN to rows 52-55, cols 12-31, the platform would overlap with the yellow platform at rows 52-55, cols 16-27 (since the blue platform covers cols 12-31, which includes cols 16-27).
So the platform can move down to rows 48-51, but not to rows 52-55 because it would overlap with the yellow platform. But the platform is at rows 44-47, not rows 48-51. So maybe the platform is being blocked earlier.
Actually, let me reconsider. Maybe the platform is being blocked when it's about to overlap with the yellow platform. The yellow platform is at rows 52-59. When the blue platform is at rows 48-51, the next DOWN move would put it at rows 52-55, which overlaps with the yellow platform. So the platform is blocked at rows 48-51.
But the platform is at rows 44-47, not rows 48-51. So maybe the platform is being blocked even earlier. Let me think about this...
Actually, I think the issue might be that the platform is being blocked when any part of it would overlap with the yellow platform. The blue platform is 4 rows tall. When it's at rows 44-47, the next DOWN move would put it at rows 48-51. The yellow platform is at rows 52-59. These don't overlap, so the move should work.
